did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is an 'Editor's Choice' review article that discusses a separate review by Du-Harpur et al. regarding artificial intelligence in dermatology. However, the paper itself does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its own results; it summarizes other studies, including one on blood mercury levels and another on hand dermatitis prevention, neither of which employed AI methods.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
